name: git
description: Git repository operations via the git CLI — clone, pull, push, log, diff, branch management, and more. Supports HTTPS (username + token) and SSH key authentication.

tools.name: git
tools.description:
Run any git command. Pass all arguments after 'git' as an array. Supports stdin for git apply / git am.

Examples:
- Clone repo: ["clone", "https://github.com/org/repo.git", "/workspace/repo"]
- Status: ["-C", "/workspace/repo", "status"]
- Pull: ["-C", "/workspace/repo", "pull", "origin", "main"]
- Log: ["-C", "/workspace/repo", "log", "--oneline", "-20"]
- Diff: ["-C", "/workspace/repo", "diff", "HEAD~1"]
- Create branch: ["-C", "/workspace/repo", "checkout", "-b", "feature/my-feature"]
- Push: ["-C", "/workspace/repo", "push", "origin", "HEAD"]

stdin.description: Optional content to pipe to git (for git apply, git am)
